pageContent.title: Companies
pageContent.subtitle: Discover the companies shaping Africa's tech landscape

companies.name: Paystack
companies.description: Paystack helps businesses in Africa get paid by anyone, anywhere in the world. Acquired by Stripe in 2020, Paystack processes millions of transactions across the continent.

companies.name: InstaDeep
companies.description: InstaDeep provides enterprise AI solutions using cutting-edge research in deep learning, reinforcement learning, and optimization. Acquired by BioNTech in 2023.

companies.name: Flutterwave
companies.description: Flutterwave provides a payment infrastructure that allows businesses to make and accept payments from customers anywhere in the world.

companies.name: Andela
companies.description: Andela connects companies with vetted remote engineers from across Africa and around the world. Building distributed engineering teams since 2014.

companies.name: Safaricom
companies.description: East Africa's largest telecommunications company and home of M-Pesa, the world's most successful mobile money platform serving over 50 million users.

companies.name: Chipper Cash
companies.description: Chipper Cash enables free peer-to-peer cross-border payments across Africa, serving millions of users with instant money transfers.
